hero.title: Discover Events. Book Instantly.
hero.subtitle: Explore the hottest events around you and secure your spot with Ticketat in seconds.

about.title: About Us
about.heading: Discover Events. Book Instantly. Enjoy Fully.
about.text: At 'Ticketat' we bring the best events to your fingertips — from concerts and festivals to parties and exclusive experiences. Explore, book, and enjoy unforgettable moments with ease and confidence.
about.text2: More than just tickets — we’re your gateway to memorable experiences.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: A simple process to create, manage, and run your events smoothly.

steps.createDesc: Set up your event in minutes by adding details like date, location, and ticket options.
steps.shareDesc: Send your event booking link to guests through social media, email, or messaging apps.
steps.bookDesc: Guests can easily book their tickets online through a fast and secure booking system.
steps.qrDesc: Use our QR code system to scan tickets and allow fast and secure entry to your event.

eventTypes.title: Event Types
eventTypes.subtitle: Choose the type of event you want to organize.

faq.title: Need Help?
faq.subtitle: Follow these steps to create and manage your event easily.

q1.question: How do I create an event?
q1.answer: After logging in, click 'Create Event' and fill in the event details like date, location, and tickets.

q2.question: How can I share the event with guests?
q2.answer: Once the event is created, share the booking link via email, social media, or messaging apps.

q3.question: How do I track bookings?
q3.answer: You can monitor all bookings in real-time through your dashboard for each event.

q4.question: How do guests enter the event?
q4.answer: Guests use a QR code generated for their tickets, which is scanned at the event entrance for fast and secure entry.

pricing.title: Event Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Pay once and only a small fee per booking.

features.f1: Only paid when a guest books

contact.title: Start Booking Your Event Today!
contact.subtitle: Get your event online quickly and easily. Our platform helps you manage everything with ease.

items.tailoredDesc: We offer a complete booking system for all types of events — private parties, conferences, or corporate gatherings — designed to meet your exact needs.
items.creativeDesc: Our platform features a smooth and intuitive design, making the booking experience fast, easy, and enjoyable for your clients.
items.EfficientManagementDesc: From tracking reservations to handling payments and reminders, we deliver high performance and reliability to ensure your events run seamlessly.
items.FullSupportDesc: Our team is here to support you at every step, from event setup to execution, with marketing solutions and additional services to maximize your event’s success.
items.EventTeamDesc: Our experienced team is ready to organize and manage any event — from setup to execution — ensuring every detail is perfect and your event is a success.

features.title: Features
features.subtitle: Streamline Your Events with Smart Booking, Management, and Real-Time Insights.

items.supportDesc: Easily book private parties, conferences, and corporate events through our fast and reliable platform.
items.socialDesc: Our expert team is ready to organize and manage any event, ensuring every detail is perfect and stress-free.
items.motionDesc: Each corporate client gets a dedicated dashboard to track bookings, manage data, and monitor their events in real-time.
items.designDesc: Get instant updates on bookings and access detailed reports and analytics to make informed decisions for your events.
items.webDesc: Guests can enter events seamlessly using QR codes generated through our dedicated app, ensuring fast and secure access.

info.name: Ticketat
info.description: Ticketat makes it simple to create, manage, and share your events online. From private parties to corporate conferences, our platform helps you handle bookings, track attendees, and promote your events effortlessly.
